transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today,

Looks good
Bon appetit
It tastes different from what I expected
It has chocolate syrup inside
Chocolate liquid

Eating that makes me want some ramyun noodles
I'll heat up the water
This one first Bacon tuna rice wrap
It's been a while since I had food from the convenience store
I must dip it into the soup
I'll eat it with the noodles
Munji
Get down
Go down
He'll jump down if I try to hug him
Nowhere to run
Mr. Big butt
Please get down
I don't like the ones with pickles So I got this

Coffee pot

Refreshing

These noodles taste better when it's undercooked

Should I bring the microwave over?
I'll bring the microwave The food is not as good

Yum

No no

Not bad

Chaotic
